name: qms-dev-workflow
description: QMS lab-control development workflow skills with dev-flow phases, Superpowers-style engineering discipline, OpenSpec-style change specs, and project conventions.

interface.shortDescription: Develop qms-lab-control features with staged specs, code conventions, SQL sync rules, and verification.
interface.longDescription: A Codex workflow plugin for qms-lab-control. It packages QMS-specific dev-flow guidance, OpenSpec-style change management, Superpowers-inspired design/TDD/debug/verification habits, and lab-control architecture references.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $qms-dev-flow to analyze, design, implement, and verify this qms-lab-control change.
